findings.title: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds
findings.actual_results:
Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds

URL: https://www.icclindia.com/Static/investor_relations/corp_govreport.aspx

Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.77 (foreground color: #018ad2, background color: #ffffff, font size: 12.0pt (16px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
- "CGR31" in "About Us"
- "CGR30" in "About Us"
- "CGR30jne" in "About Us"
- "CGR31march" in "About Us"
- "CGR31dec" in "About Us"
- "CGR30sept" in "About Us"
- "CGR3019" in "About Us"
- "CGR312019" in "About Us"
- "CGR3118" in "About Us"
- "CGR3018" in "About Us"
- "CGR3006" in "About Us"
- "CGR3106" in "About Us"
- "CGR3117" in "About Us"
- "CGR3017" in "About Us"
- "CGR301706" in "About Us"
- "CGR31017" in "About Us"
findings.incorrect_code: Corporate Governance Report December 31,2025 Corporate Governance Report September 30, 2025 Corporate Governance Report June 30, 2025 Corporate Governance Report March 31, 2025 Corporate Governance Report December 31, 2024 Corporate Governance Report September 30, 2024 Corporate Governance Report June 30, 2024 Corporate Governance Report March 31, 2024 Corporate Governance Report December 31, 2023 Corporate Governance Report September 30, 2023 Corporate Governance Report June 30, 2023 Corporate Governance Report March 31, 2023 Corporate Governance Report December 31, 2022 Corporate Governance Report September 30, 2022 Corporate Governance Report June 30, 2022 Corporate Governance Report March 31, 2022 Corporate Governance Report December 31, 2021 Corporate Governance Report September 30, 2021 Corporate Governance Report June 30, 2021 Corporate Governance Report March 31, 2021 Corporate Governance Report December 31, 2020 Corporate Governance Report September 30, 2020 Corporate Governance Report June 30, 2020 Corporate Governance Report March 31, 2020 Corporate Governance Report December 31, 2019 Corporate Governance Report September 30, 2019 Corporate Governance Report June 30, 2019 Corporate Governance Report March 31, 2019 Corporate Governance Report December 31, 2018 Corporate Governance Report September 30, 2018 Corporate Governance Report June 30, 2018 Corporate Governance Report March 31, 2018 Corporate Governance Report December 31, 2017 Corporate Governance Report September 30, 2017 Corporate Governance Report June 30, 2017 Corporate Governance Report March 31, 2017
findings.recommendation:
Adjust foreground/background colors so text and interactive controls meet WCAG 2 AA contrast thresholds (minimum 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text).
- Adjust text/background colors until contrast reaches at least 4.5:1 for normal text and 3:1 for large text.
- Re-check hover/focus/visited states of links and buttons to keep contrast compliant in all states.

findings.title: <html> element must have a lang attribute
findings.actual_results:
Ensure every HTML document has a lang attribute

URL: https://www.icclindia.com/Static/investor_relations/corp_govreport.aspx

The <html> element does not have a lang attribute
- "Skip to main content -A A +A Group Websites Language Home About Us Investor Rela" in Page section
findings.recommendation:
Set the document language using the lang attribute on the <html> element.
- Review affected elements and apply semantic HTML updates required by this rule.
- Retest after fixes and verify no violations remain.

any.message: The <html> element does not have a lang attribute

raw_nodes.html: <html>
raw_nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  The <html> element does not have a lang attribute

findings.title: Document should have one main landmark
findings.actual_results:
Ensure the document has a main landmark

URL: https://www.icclindia.com/Static/investor_relations/corp_govreport.aspx

Document does not have a main landmark
- "Skip to main content -A A +A Group Websites Language Home About Us Investor Rela" in Page section
findings.recommendation:
Provide exactly one main landmark to help screen-reader users identify primary page content.
- Review affected elements and apply semantic HTML updates required by this rule.
- Retest after fixes and verify no violations remain.

all.message: Document does not have a main landmark

raw_nodes.html: <html>
raw_nodes.failureSummary:
Fix all of the following:
  Document does not have a main landmark

findings.title: Links must have discernible text
findings.actual_results: Ensure links have discernible text URL: https://www.icclindia.com/Static/investor_relations/corp_govreport.aspx Accessible name is missing. Add a visible label/text, or provide aria-label, aria-labelledby, or title as appropriate. - "#highcontrast" in "About Us"
findings.recommendation:
Give every link an accessible name that clearly describes its destination or action.
- Ensure each link has clear, unique visible text describing destination/action.
- Avoid generic labels like "click here" or "read more" without context.
- Reference: https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/link/

any.message: Element does not have text that is visible to screen readers
aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty
aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty
Element has no title attribute

none.message: Element is in tab order and does not have accessible text

raw_nodes.failureSummary:
Fix all of the following:
  Element is in tab order and does not have accessible text

Fix any of the following:
  Element does not have text that is visible to screen readers
  aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty
  aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty
  Element has no title attribute

findings.title: Page should contain a level-one heading
findings.wcag_name: Page should contain a level-one heading
findings.actual_results:
Ensure that the page, or at least one of its frames contains a level-one heading

URL: https://www.icclindia.com/Static/investor_relations/corp_govreport.aspx

Page must have a level-one heading
- "Skip to main content -A A +A Group Websites Language Home About Us Investor Rela" in Page section
findings.recommendation:
Page should contain a level-one heading
- Inspect all flagged elements and apply semantic HTML fix required by this rule.
- Validate the fix in keyboard and screen-reader flow.
- Run scan again to confirm violation is resolved.

all.message: Page must have a level-one heading

raw_nodes.html: <html>
raw_nodes.failureSummary:
Fix all of the following:
  Page must have a level-one heading

findings.title: All page content should be contained by landmarks
findings.wcag_name: All page content should be contained by landmarks
findings.actual_results:
Ensure all page content is contained by landmarks

URL: https://www.icclindia.com/Static/investor_relations/corp_govreport.aspx

Some page content is not contained by landmarks
- "-A A +A" in "About Us"
- "div" in "About Us"
- "Corporate Governance Report Home Investor Relations Corporate Governance Report" in "About Us"
- "Corporate Governance Report December 31,2025 Corporate Governance Report Septemb" in "About Us"
findings.incorrect_code:
<div class="h-100 d-inline-flex align-items-center">

<div class="container-fluid d-none d-lg-block">

<div class="bg-gray-7">

<div class="container-fluid">
findings.recommendation:
Ensure all significant page content is inside semantic landmarks.
- Wrap major content in semantic landmarks such as <main>, <header>, and <footer>.
- Ensure only one primary <main> landmark is present.

any.message: Some page content is not contained by landmarks
